use_cases: Creative agency portfolios showcasing services with animated image reveals
Landing pages displaying feature categories with interactive hover animations
Portfolio grids revealing project previews on text hover interactions
Service listings with layered image effects for visual storytelling
Interactive showcase sections for design studios and agencies
ai_summary: A hover-activated image reveal component displaying layered images that animate and become visible when hovering over text headings. Features two stacked images with scale, opacity, and transform transitions that create a playful, interactive portfolio-style experience for showcasing creative work.
